programme.title: Newsline In Depth

programme.title: Smitten In Japan
programme.desc: Fresh perspectives on lesser-known parts of Japan. This time, melon pan, a unique Japanese bread, introduced by a fan from Latvia who can't get enough! But wait, why is it called melon pan?

programme.desc: Ito Chimomo leads a wonderfully rustic life in Hayama, close to the sea and surrounded by nature. Cooking and family are central to her world, but getting to where she is was far from easy.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history and culture. This episode looks at words related to horses. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Fukushima Time-Lapse
programme.desc: Ten years on from the 2011 tsunami and nuclear disaster, time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke seeks out the undiminished beauty of Fukushima - this time we focus on mountains.

programme.title: Japan From Above: Up Close
programme.desc: This programme takes you on an aerial journey across 21st-century Japan. Enjoy the bird's-eye view of unique landscapes as well as intimate portraits of the people who inhabit the archipelago.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E51 - Ilulissat, Greenland'. Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Waffle and Benji'. Evie has been given her first ever homework, while Waffle has been awarded Benji, the class toy, for good behaviour. Zoe and Callum have exciting news, and Evie emails her birth dad, Nate.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - Harbour Machines'. Grace helps out with some repairs in a mooring barge, shows us the world's largest boat lift and gets behind the wheel of a solar ferry!

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - Building Bridges'. It's soup time. Major has made a new table, but when the soup mugs are put on the table, it collapses and the soup spills everywhere. Oh dear!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E11 - Going In and Coming Out'. The Teletubbies watch children going in and coming out of different things.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Igglepiggle Looks for Upsy Daisy and Follows Her Bed'. Enter a magical world between waking and sleeping. Igglepiggle cannot find Upsy Daisy, but then he spots her bed. What has Upsy Daisy been doing?

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Superhero Rules'. When David has a problem at school he gets worried about all the school rules. Zainab tells him that everyone has to follow rules, even adults and even superheroes!

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Footy Friends'. Mali is upset that Alex hasn't been showing up for football practice. Zainab and Kobi decide to make sure that Alex is okay but discover that Alex is having to look after her ill mum.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Key'. Dee encourages a friend to say 'key' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a silver key, a locking key, a car key and a castle key. There's even a magic key!

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Earth Explorers
programme.desc: 'S8/E19 - Caves'. Nina investigates how caves were formed, with the help of Belle her hearing neuron.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Beans'. Dee encourages a friend to say beans and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Andy's Top Five
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Andy reveals his top cutest moments, with fascinating facts to accompany the adorable action.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animals
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - First Steps'. Andy Day looks at the tricky first steps of baby animals such as polar bears, elephants and Mandarin ducklings.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E18'. Thomas' old friend, Merlin, comes to Sodor. Merlin thinks he can turn himself invisible in a puff of smoke!

programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Postman Pat and the Sculpture Trail'. There is a sculpture trail in Greendale and Pat has to collect all the entries and take them to the event. However, naughty Rosie escapes and starts eating the sculptures!

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S2/E50'. Cbeebies is a brightly coloured world full of stories, discovery and giggles. It's a place where your child's curiosity about the world can be nurtured

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Bull'. When a bull wanders into the sheep's field, Shaun finds out it's a bad idea to make him 'see red'.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Sing Song'. Mr Rosen and his friends help the family to stuff envelopes after their minibus breaks down outside Topsy and Tim's house.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Van'. V vrooms in and takes jaybird J on a musical road trip to help her learn how to fly. This episode introduces the letters J and V and the words van, jog, jig, jug, vet and jet.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Party'. When the Alphablocks party is a flop, superhero Exciting X comes to the rescue. This episode has fun with the words sag, sad and sax.

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Weekend'. At the weekend, Bluey and Bingo are playing in the garden with Dad. But Bingo gets upset when she discovers a walking leaf insect and Dad doesn't notice.

programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - King Cook'. Cook claims to be a descendant of royalty and demands to be treated like a king.

programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Tag's First Day'. The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S1/E93 - Cold'. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: Tik Tak
programme.desc: 'S1/E17'. Explore disco penguins, a sand drawing of a whale and watch as Book Boy makes a caravan.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - The Creek'. Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Fairies'. Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E4 - Kelly Gissendaner & Greg Owen'. A loving husband and father goes missing, triggering a police investigation that uncovers an illicit romance fuelled by deadly passion.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Cosmetic Killer'. When a devious and defiant doctor refuses to change his ways a chilling investigation ensues into a string of bizarre deaths at an Arizona cosmetic surgery clinic.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Murder Of Nisha Patel-Nasri'. When Nisha ran out onto her driveway with stab wounds, shocked neighbours called 999 - police could not predict the web of lies they'd discover while searching for answers.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Unholy Matrimony'. A young woman committed to her faith is lured in by the idea of holy matrimony, but she soon learns that her man of God is no saint.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Joanna Dennehy'. The case of Joanna Dennehy, who is serving a full life sentence for murdering three men and attempting to kill two others in and around Peterborough over a 10-day period in March 2013.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Cosmetic Killer'. When a devious and defiant doctor refuses to change his ways a chilling investigation ensues into a string of bizarre deaths at an Arizona cosmetic surgery clinic.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Collar And Leash Killer'. Women are found dead by the roadside with a unique ligature resembling a dog collar and leash. Police are stumped until a teenage girl escapes a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Killer Athlete'. A bandit takes over the I-5 corridor in California terrorising the highway with assaults and murders. The only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Murder For My Man

48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E6 - The Girl Next Door'. In 2003, a teenage girl's body was found in a trash bag left behind a restaurant in peaceful Castro Valley, California, and the gruesome discovery became a detective's obsession.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 - Melanie Ray & Chandler Clark'. A good Samaritan falls victim to a brutal crime, leading police on a manhunt for a pair of killers fuelled by envy and rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Erin Caffey & Charlie Wilkinson'. When a family falls victim to a devastating crime, the search for the killers lays bare a twisted romance and a motive no one can believe.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Bound To Kill'. A serial killer taunted Witchita, Kansas for decades with brazen letters taking credit for his kills. At the introduction of the computer era, the killer accidentally leaves behind a digital clue.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Keys To A Killer'. Louisiana is terrorised by multiple serial killers. The small-town PD of Zachary discover the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The I-40 Killer'. A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware. But when investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Prescription For Murder'. Investigators in L.A look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Murder Of Alice Gross'. When detective Carl Mehta got assigned to investigate the disappearance of teenager Alice, everyone feared the worst. The largest search operation in years was launched.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Bullets On Bourbon Street'. A beautiful young bartender is swept off her feet by a charismatic up-and-coming rapper. But when a night out takes a violent turn, she sacrifices everything to protect him.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect

programme.title: Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Energy: A Burning Question'. Compared to our ancestors, we have incredible power at our disposal. But what exactly is energy? Where does it come from?

programme.title: Titans: The Rise of Wall Street
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Changing Of The Guard'. Having transformed America into an economic juggernaut, JP Morgan hands control of his banking empire to his only son, Jack.

programme.title: Titans: The Rise of Wall Street
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Railroad Rivalry'. As the turn of the century approaches, JP Morgan's dominance on Wall Street is unquestioned. But soon the rapid expansion of railroads gives a rival, Jacob Schiff.

programme.title: Coasts: Rolling With The Waves
programme.desc: We love our coasts, and so do animals! The corridor of water where the open ocean meets coastal habitats is known as the surf zone. The churning forces of the waves crash.

programme.title: Secret Life Underground
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Part 1: The Skin Of The Earth'. We know less than 10% of the organisms that populate the underground world and that, each in their own way, take an active part in creating the soil.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Island Dogs'. In our season opener, Doug takes his drone to the Dominican Republic to rescue puppies that have been abandoned in the municipal town dump.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Urban Hyenas'. Doug travels to Malawi, central Africa, to work with hyena researchers who are eager to employ his drone. What the infrared camera shows them will surprise them all.

programme.title: Hot Tuna
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates HOT TUNA, which plumbs the secrets of the legendary Atlantic bluefin tuna, on a quest for the last refuge of a giant among fish.

programme.title: Lake Magic
programme.desc: Mini oceans inland, lakes are treasure troves of aquatic wonders, each zone, from the depths to the surface, hosts its own animal communities.

programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter
programme.desc: Two otter pups have been carefully watched over by their mother for a year, but her tireless work will soon come to an end.

programme.title: Secret Life of Lakes
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Part 1: Lake Nasser'. Lake Nasser is the result of the construction of the Aswan High Dam. The consequences, positive and negative, of the existence of this huge reservoir are equally spectacular.

programme.title: Secret Life of Lakes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. In the heart of Siberia, a paradoxical lake defies the usual laws of such bodies of water. It is 25 million years old and getting deeper every day.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Dixie Fire Foxes'. After the Dixie Fire devastates the town of Greenville, Doug heads in with his old friend, Shannon, to rescue the lost cats and wild animals that have been left behind.

programme.title: Time Flies
programme.desc: We like to think we can control everything: changing the course of water, reclaiming land, replanting deserts.

programme.title: Seasons of the Forest
programme.desc: No place on Earth is more changeable than the seasonal forest, undergoing radical transformations year after year.

programme.title: Secret Life of Lakes
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Part 3: Tonle Sap'. This lake and river system in Cambodia is unique in the world, and the people residing on its banks live a part aquatic and part terrestrial existence.

programme.title: Secret Life of Lakes
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Part 4: Lencois'. The dunes that stretch as far as the eye can see to the north of São Luís make one think of the Sahara, but the water surrounding the dunes is not a mirage.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Dixie Fire Foxes'. After the Dixie Fire devastates the town of Greenville, Doug heads in with his old friend, Shannon, to rescue the lost cats and wild animals that have been left behind.

programme.title: Doug To The Rescue
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Tornado Town'. In the season finale, Doug takes his drone to the tornado-ravaged town of Kentucky to rescue the slew of cats and dogs that have been lost in the brutal December storm.

programme.title: Brown Bears - Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! From the tundra of Alaska to the forests of Japan, brown bears can turn their paws to just about any environment.

programme.title: Seasons Of The Otter
programme.desc: Two otter pups have been carefully watched over by their mother for a year, but her tireless work will soon come to an end.

programme.title: Seasons of the Forest
programme.desc: No place on Earth is more changeable than the seasonal forest, undergoing radical transformations year after year.

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable with Miranda...
programme.desc: 'Mission Unstoppable With Miranda Cosgrove. S1/E25 - A Chemist, More Chemists, and a Conservationist'. A science entertainer shows us the way to entertain using science.

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable with Miranda...
programme.desc: 'Mission Unstoppable With Miranda Cosgrove. S1/E1 - Songs, Sweets, and Space'. Two Hollywood music producers explain the science behind your favourite pop hits and an inventor who engineered a sweet twist on ice cream.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: 'S1/E104 - Saving Right Whale/Flight of the Dragon'. The North Atlantic Right Whale is on the verge of extinction from ship strikes and entanglement in fishing lines. Relive the thrilling return of SpaceX's Dragon capsule.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: 'S1/E101 - Saber-Tooth/Raising Dinos/Sun's Lost Planet'. Fossils are shining a light on the violent lives of Saber-tooth cats. A team of scientists unlock dinosaur DNA. Do hidden Planet X and Planet 9 exist?

programme.title: Proof of Concept
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Conceiving Consciousness'. Simone Giertz, Reggie Watts, and Naomi Fitter join Dianna for an exploration of what consciousness is and whether it can ever be understood. Also, a robot tells jokes.

programme.title: Proof of Concept
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Randomness & Probability'. Comedian, Maz Jobrani, and Blackjack legend, Mike Aponte, play the odds, meanwhile, Dianna finds order in chaos, and just maybe hacks the stock market.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: 'On The Trail Of A Hitman'. Wally Dekanich is shot at point-blank range on the doorstep of his townhouse.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - A Fatal Fare'. On a frigid December morning in Toronto's west end, a middle-aged man is repeatedly stabbed, then dumped in the centre of an empty parking lot.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - Mathilde Croguennec Case'. June 23rd, 2005, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending 'Teknival' in France, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Jean-Raymond Blatti Case'. March 21st, 2002, Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant.

programme.title: Innocent Behind Bars
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - John Button - 5 Years in Prison'. John Button was the prime suspect in the killing of his girlfriend, Rosemary Anderson. He was convicted of manslaughter.

programme.title: Innocent Behind Bars
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Derrick Jamison - 20 Years on Death Row'. Derrick Jamison was convicted for murder, and sentenced to death. He languished on death row, desperate to prove his innocence as he faced execution six times.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Severed'. On January 18th, 2008, in a quiet neighbourhood in Calgary, a homeless man is searching through a dumpster, when he discovers what appears to be a dismembered right arm!

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Death Trap on the Road'. Sunday, July 22, 2001. A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle. Runaway? Abduction?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Fatal Passion'. October 15 2010. The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Spaced Out!'. Mickey and friends help Minnie fix her Perfect Pizza Party when the food delivery is wrong. The gang travels to hear Wanda Warbler sing, but she wanders off right before the show!

programme.title: A Goofy Fairy Tale
programme.desc: When Goofy's magic trick accidently makes all the bedtime stories disappear from the Clubhouse, he must find a way to bring them back.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E94'. Luna and Motsuki drop Luna's magnet in the moat - and are silly enough to accept Octobella'a help getting it. Motsuki gets angry at being told she's too 'buggy' to be in charge.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Honey Bee Boogie Woogie/ Willow in the Wild'. The Squad needs to find a honey bee who disappeared from her colony. When a mute beaver needs the Chicken Squad's help, Little Boo struggles to embrace a new way of communicating.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - A Visit from the Bearded Dragon/ the Bark Flies'. The squad tries to help a lost lizard reunite with his family. Coop tries to imitate the style of his favorite fictional detective but ends up blowing the case.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Spy Game'. Spy Game: A game in the park goes haywire when Bingo stops playing. Now Bluey must win her back.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Five minutes feels like an eternity as Dad and the kids wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing Butterflies in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. When horsing around with Dad goes too far, Bingo learns about finding her big girl voice.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Calypso'. At school, Bluey and her friends throw themselves into various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song - all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Doctor'. Honey's trip to see Dr. Bingo keeps getting interrupted by other, more exciting patients.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. Mum and Dad create their own Magic Claw machine at home, but can Bluey win the big prize?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Markets'. With five bucks from the tooth fairy, Bluey is overwhelmed with possibilities at the markets.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. In the park, the Heeler family play a game of hand puppets and go on an epic adventure.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Unforgettable Unbirthday / Picnic for One'. When Princess Rosa's birthday cake goes wrong, Alice surprises her with an Unbirthday Cake! The Cheshire Cat has a colossal order for Alice that she gladly completes.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Car in a Tree/ Dalmatian Day'. When the Firebuds visit the moto-skate park, Piston gets stuck in a tree. The Firebuds are asked to watch puppies, but when Bo underestimates the task, the puppies escape.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Web Beard's Treasure / Washed Away'. Doc Ock tricks our heroes into getting treasure for her. Spidey and Ms. Marvel go down into the sewer tunnels to save TRACE-E, but they discover the Green Goblin is down there!

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Spidey Team'. Bootsie gets lost at the Cat Show and Doc Ock turns her into a super-sized, monster kitty! During the concert, Doc Ock steals the drumset and uses it to hypnotize the entire audience!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' (toilet), because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E94 - Duck Cake'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E95 - Handstand'. At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E96 - Helicopter'. Bluey and her friends turn a tree stump into a thrilling game of Helicopter. But as the pilot, Bluey has to learn to give up some control, so they can all have fun.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E97 - Octopus'. When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand, until they realise they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Going Green'. Team Spidey is planting trees in the park, but Green Goblin interrupts by spewing gas everywhere. Peter uses his new invention to clean up a mess.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E90 - Muffin Cone'. When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play 'sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E91 - Circus'. Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus with her friends, but Hercules wants to play his motorcycle game instead. Luckily Bluey has a solution to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E92 - Road Trip'. Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' (toilet), because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.desc: 'S2/E94 - Duck Cake'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.desc: 'S2/E95 - Handstand'. At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cliffhanger/ the Very First Fire'. Iggy and Rod fall onto a narrow ledge and The Buds must learn to do things the safe way in order to rescue them. A park play fort catches fire and Bo knows The Buds can put it out.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E84'. Armadylan and CB compete over an exclusive Master Fang comic thinking it contains a hero secret. Armadylan loses the PJs' special jet to Night Ninja.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E90 - Cupcake's Birthday/ Dog Was Derby'. When the plans for Cupcake's birthday go awry, Rufus suggests that they find the perfect gift for her instead. Bob has too much to do at Playcare, so the pups gear up to help!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E91 - New Year, New Bob'. Bob and the Pugs head to the baseball Hall of Fame! Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special!

programme.desc: An out-of-control LAPD officer gets his partner killed in a deadly hostage situation, he gets suspended from the police force and heads to Mexico to face off against corrupt cops.

programme.title: He Got Game
programme.desc: A basketball player's father must try to convince him to go to a college so he can get a shorter sentence.

programme.title: Home Affairs: A Love Story
programme.desc: A Valentine's day sequel to Home Affairs: A Christmas Story. The Williams family gathers to celebrate Pieter and Benita's wedding. But secrets surface and threaten their happiness.

programme.title: Nativity
programme.desc: With their community hall facing closure, a group of locals try to put on a Christmas play to raise money.

programme.title: Herb & Moon
programme.desc: A delightful South African festive film. When a rebellious grandfather finds out he won't spend Christmas with his granddaughter, he 'breaks out' of his old age home to see her.

programme.title: Surrogates

programme.title: Step Up 3D

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Shangri-La

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E2 of 2'. Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso, Texas. She meets Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso as her husband is stuck in Juarez.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Maltloaf'. Gregg Wallace sees how maltloaf is produced on a mass-scale.

programme.title: Eugenics: Science's Greatest Scandal
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Episode 2'. Science journalist Angela Saini and disability rights activist Adam Pearson investigate how the legacy of eugenics continues to the present day.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Out in the Cold'. Kim and Pierre's trapping season is complicated by a troublesome local resident, Becky enlists her dog team to help secure a supply of firewood. 'Pike' Mike hunts for small game.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Littoral Combat Ships'. The US Navy's fastest combat ships are capable of a turn of speed only possible due to a revolutionary water propulsion system and the chance discovery of a brand new alloy.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Ultimate Predators'. Steve looks back at his top Deadly Predators from the series and meets the ultimate predator. He reviews the biggest and best stunts from the series.

programme.title: Work On The Wild Side
programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. Debbie calls on Emma to take in two abandoned jackals, Josie at the Vervet Monkey Foundation introduces orphan Theo to his new foster mum and Emily and Will relocate two cheetahs to spread bloodlines.

programme.title: Work On The Wild Side
programme.desc: 'S1/E20'. Emma looks after a bush baby who needs 24/7 care, a bush fire forces Jenna and Sean to stop elephant research for the day, and Annie and Lisa undertake a vital rhino collaring procedure.

programme.title: Animal Einsteins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Masterminds'. Using innovative techniques, Chris Packham investigates how nature's masterminds measure up against human brainpower.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E2 of 2'. Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso, Texas. She meets Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso as her husband is stuck in Juarez.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - New Zealand'. Ben goes to New Zealand and spends time with a hunter-gatherer couple who have raised two teenagers in complete isolation.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Life And Death'. Ricko DeWilde races against the freeze to fortify the family cabin. The Hailstones scout the land for seasonal resources. Sue Aikens must repair vital safety equipment before tundra storms arrive.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - International Space Station'. A look at the construction and maintenance of the international space station, revealing how it was influenced by an unconventional aircraft designer and a 19th-century rebreather.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Texas'. Ben hunts rattlesnakes and meets eccentric desert folk with a former fashion photographer who ditched his New York mansion for the Texan wilderness.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Taking Chances'. Andy Bassich and Denise Becker attempt a harvest that isn't usually available this time of year. Iriqtaiq Hailstone sets out to help her sisters and to teach her son a native skill.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland with a visit to a glacier, a trip to the island of Heimay which was nearly destroyed by a volcanic eruption in the 1970s.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra - on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: Blue Planet II: Oceans of Wonder
programme.desc: This extended special of the nature documentary series journeys from the equator to the unexplored depths, meeting the best-loved characters from the series.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Himalayas'. Sue travels from the sacred summit of Shivling, source of the Ganges, to the beautiful mountain town of Rishikesh. Along the way, she meets Hindu holy men known as sadhus.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Littoral Combat Ships'. The US Navy's fastest combat ships are capable of a turn of speed only possible due to a revolutionary water propulsion system and the chance discovery of a brand new alloy.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Guatemala'. Ben ventures deep into the jungles of Guatemala, once home to an ancient Mayan civilisation but also the 'new life' of Mike Merrill, a former sound engineer from Texas.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Feast or Famine'. Pike Mike tries to improvise a new source of bush power, Kim and Pierre are forced to exploit their survival food supply, and Becky and Bentley hit the hunting trail.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Tesla'. A behind-the-scenes look at the Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Himalayas'. Sue travels from the sacred summit of Shivling, source of the Ganges, to the beautiful mountain town of Rishikesh. Along the way, she meets Hindu holy men known as sadhus.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Feast or Famine'. Pike Mike tries to improvise a new source of bush power, Kim and Pierre are forced to exploit their survival food supply, and Becky and Bentley hit the hunting trail.

programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Guatemala'. Ben ventures deep into the jungles of Guatemala, once home to an ancient Mayan civilisation but also the 'new life' of Mike Merrill, a former sound engineer from Texas.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Sharks'. Steve uncovers the secrets of sharks, the world's most infamous predators. He heads out into the Atlantic Ocean to dive with blue sharks, a beautiful but deadly species.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E2'. Drag queens Jordan and Thomas have one week to drop a dress size, while best friends Earl and Vince go on six week faith-based diets. And mums Maria and Jules want to lose weight within three months.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E3'. Newlyweds Steven and Eamonn have 8 days to trim down ahead of a holiday, friends Valetta and Paulette go on six week diets to slim before a wedding, and Sian and Keighlee want to lose weight.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E4'. Colleagues Sheila and Syrika have 1 week to diet ahead of a party. Partners Greg and Nath go on 6-week diets to slim before Lincoln Pride. Pals Becci and Cassie have 4 months to diet before a wedding.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Himalayas'. Sue travels from the sacred summit of Shivling, source of the Ganges, to the beautiful mountain town of Rishikesh. Along the way, she meets Hindu holy men known as sadhus.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Texas'. Ben hunts rattlesnakes and meets eccentric desert folk with a former fashion photographer who ditched his New York mansion for the Texan wilderness.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Georgia, USA'. Adventurer Ben Fogle journeys to the swamplands of Georgia to live with Colbert, a former city fat cat-turned-jungle Tarzan.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - The Other Side'. Ricko DeWilde travels to cursed lands to finally lay his brother's spirit to rest. Sue Aikens ventures into the tundra to map the shifting landscape.

programme.title: Living Wild: How to Change Your Life
The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. In the Philippines, the Taal volcano violently erupts, blasting ash and spewing debris over nearby towns and villages. In Queensland, Australia, a freak hail storm unleashes a destructive assault on residents.

programme.title: Puerto Rico: Island Of Enchantment
programme.desc: A team of conservation champions are trying to save precious species which live in Puerto Rico. Find out how parrots, manatees, and turtles are making a comeback.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Tesla'. A behind-the-scenes look at the Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. In Texas and Mexico, the first Atlantic hurricane of the season makes landfall, creating dangerous flooding and widespread destruction. A tornado outbreak unleashes carnage on Oklahoma, Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Volcano'. Volcan del Fuego in Guatemala is one of the most 'explosive' volcanoes of them all. To reveal what's happening within the volcano, visit the 'new' Island of Surtsey.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Missouri'. Ben travels to the Ozark Plateau in Missouri to meet Bo Brown, a wilderness expert who teaches Stone Age skills to modern day man. Ben learns how to make a spear and prepare foods like squirrels and insects.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Snowbound'. Becky makes a last-ditch effort to harvest a Muskox, Kim and Pierre must upgrade their shelter, desperate for a successful fur season, Bentley works his trapline, and caught in a deep-freeze.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Airlander 10'. Revealing the secret behind the construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Bobby And Sophie On The Coast
Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S30/E11 - Fowl Shot'. Bobby Flay tries not to get dunked on by basketball legend Amar'e Stoudemire and Katie Lee Biegel. Chefs Michael O'Halloran and Alex Stickland go for the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S30/E12 - Foodie Downer'. Eddie Jackson and actress and comedian Rachel Dratch are hoping for a win against Bobby. They bring in chefs Dorian Hunter and Britt Rescigno.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 - GGG Vs Iron Chefs'. Three of the best past winners battle for the chance to take on Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. The last chef standing competes with Alex to win $10,000.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Season Of Sharing'. Eight bakers team up to make a dozen hand pies in a festive holiday shape. Then they create a dessert duo inspired by classic holiday flavour combinations.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 - GGG Vs Iron Chefs'. Three of the best past winners battle for the chance to take on Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. The last chef standing competes with Alex to win $10,000.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E22 - Milan'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Nugget? Fuhgettaboutit!'. The young chefs make chicken nuggets and attempt to cook the bay scallops to perfection. In the dessert round there's a fun time with Mesozoic candies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E9 - Teenager Friendly Food'. Ree's got a busy day cooking for hungry teenagers. She serves up tasty chilli pie burritos, honey pecan chicken strips, and pizza grilled cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E10 - Date Night'. Ree makes a special Italian-inspired dinner for two. Her date night chicken pasta is accompanied by a colourful everything antipasto salad and 4-cheese flatbreads.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Taco Night Twist'. Molly invites her friends over. She makes delicious fresh fillings like avocado and cucumber for tacos and for dessert she has chocolate-covered ice cream tacos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Generational Goodies'. Molly's mum visits to help prepare delicious food before the baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls and citrus chicken rice bowls with grilled veg.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - The Jesse James Trail'. Andrew eats the Civil War-era foods that fuelled the notorious James-Younger gang. Food includes rotten tomato ketchup, ham cake, and stewed rabbit.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E1 - Superchef, Supermodel'. Supermodel Gigi Hadid and chef Anne Burrell team up to defeat Bobby. They are hoping international chefs Melissa Araujo and Max Robbins have what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E2 - The Dynamic Duo'. Michael Symon and Giada De Laurentiis try to continue their winning streak against Bobby. The formidable duo recruit chefs Jessica Gamble and Fabrizio Schenardi.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Lemon Bffs'. Duff and Valerie have citrus-based challenge for the 10 kid bakers. They are tasked with creating lemon bar desserts that highlight its zingy flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E7 - Cosmopolitan Comfort'. This trip, Guy Fieri tucks into cosmopolitan comfort food. He samples corned beef and cabbage, Ethiopian specialties, and lamb poutine-loaded hot dogs!

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E5 - Beat The Judge: Marc'. Three champions are on a mission to beat judge Marc Murphy. The chefs get escargot in the first basket, and a spicy surprise awaits them in the entree basket.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Cookie Pairings'. Five fantastic cookie makers create marvellous cookie mug toppers, decadent cookie dunkers and edible cookie platters for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E2 - Grudge Match: Battle 2'. Four judges step behind the stove for an intense competition. In the appetiser basket, the chefs find a strange fish dish and some tiny exotic fruits.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Father Cooks Best'. Three dads and their kids pit their family recipes against each other hoping to win $20,000. This family feast begins with a greatest grilled dinner challenge.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S52/E13'. Four champions return on a mission to become a sous-chef for a series judge. A stinky fruit and a spicy ice cream feature in the dessert round.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Thanksgiving Genius'. The seven remaining bakers must create a Thanksgiving dessert using a mystery canned fruit. Then they make a new dish by combining two traditional desserts.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E1 - Time Capsule: '60s Foods!'. The competing chefs have to cook with foods that were popular in the 1960s. A certain soda and some sweet meat are part of the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Stew Or Get Off The Lot'. The pressure is on as the four chefs try to prepare perfect paninis. Plus, there's no time to go low and slow to concoct savoury stews.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E7 - Cosmopolitan Comfort'. This trip, Guy Fieri tucks into cosmopolitan comfort food. He samples corned beef and cabbage, Ethiopian specialties, and lamb poutine-loaded hot dogs!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Father Cooks Best'. Three dads and their kids pit their family recipes against each other hoping to win $20,000. This family feast begins with a greatest grilled dinner challenge.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Father Cooks Best'. Three dads and their kids pit their family recipes against each other hoping to win $20,000. This family feast begins with a greatest grilled dinner challenge.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E12 - Chilled Out'. Ree creates cool recipes for a very hot day! She serves up an amazing salmon niçoise Caesar salad mashup and the coolest California roll sushi bowl.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. Molly Yeh makes quick recipes suitable for her busy life as a new mum. She has savoury green pancakes for lunch, and then a sausage and macaroni dish for dinner.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. Molly Yeh's family is in town to celebrate Rosh Hashana, and she makes a fabulous brunch of sweet apple butter rolls and a tender and juicy brisket and carrot hash.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E4 - Napoleon's March Through Poland'. Andrew gets a taste of the culinary impact of Napoleon Bonaparte's march through Poland. He tries tripe soup and rump steak seasoned with gunpowder.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E3 - A Sticky Situation'. Alex Guarnaschelli and Geoffrey Zakarian bring in two talented pastry chefs to defeat Bobby. One chef makes delicious Brazilian nut torrijas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E4 - Double Trouble'. Comedian Heidi Gardner teams up with food critic Katie Lee to defeat Bobby. They recruit four chefs, including one of Bobby's former employees, to get the win.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Cake And Ice Cream 2.0'. Duff and Valerie challenge the nine remaining kid bakers to work with the classic combination of cake and ice cream to create unique desserts.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E6 - Slumping Sales In San Jose'. Robert finds The Breakfast Place in San Jose, CA, uninspired, dirty and on the brink of closing for good. Can he save the owners' business and friendship?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E9 - Big Food, Small Towns'. Guy Fieri visits small towns with big food! He checks out a butchery cranking out corn dogs and a 1700s inn-turned-gastropub serving a spin on disco fries.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E6 - Beat The Judge: Maneet'. Previous winners return to take on judge Maneet Chauhan. Cereal and odd meatballs make for a tough round one, and an edible centrepiece is in the next basket.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A New Holiday Spin'. The six remaining bakers create new takes on traditional holiday baking. Inspired by an internet baking meme, they use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Sweet Spot'. The bakers are challenged to make a super-sized decorated cookie for Santa. Then, to claim the $10,000, they create a 3D winter wonderland scene using cookies.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E3 - Grudge Match: Battle 4'. Cooking legends face off for a chance at the $100,000 finale! In round one, the chefs must incorporate a sweet breakfast item into an appetiser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S31/E3 - Lovely Lunch For Mom'. Ree Drummond shares ideas for a special lunch for mum. The luxurious menu includes grilled chicken lettuce wraps and a colourful grain salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Let's Get Cozy!'. Molly Yeh is making hearty foods to keep her family warm. They include comforting chicken and dumpling soup with decadent no knead salami bread.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Practice On The Farm'. Molly Yeh makes a Midwest-Italian inspired feast. The tasty menu includes spaghetti and juicy meatballs and charred broccolini on creamy homemade ricotta.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A New Holiday Spin'. The six remaining bakers create new takes on traditional holiday baking. Inspired by an internet baking meme, they use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S50/E2 - Time Capsule: '90s Foods!'. The chefs set out to make trendy 1990s foods yummy for a new millennium. The combination of ingredients in the first basket confuses the competitors.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - La Familia'. Tech specialists Paul and Colin search the residence of Pablo's wife, Tata. And, a late-night dig at La Cathedral turns into a potentially dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: Dual Survival

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Next Big Sting'. Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders rescue a wounded Speed Stinger and take it back to Dragon's Edge, unaware of the dangers that follow.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Brother George/Ape Mitzvah'. George spreads himself thin and discovers he's not actually an ape!

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Permission Impossible'. When Ra's parents refuse to let him go on the school camping trip, he sneaks away and gets lost in the Scary Woods with Casper and Mantha.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - A Babysitter For The Skittles'. The Skittles become bored while Mr Wobbly Man babysits, so Noddy suggests that they might like what he does, making jelly and they do and think he's the best babysitter ever.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Dapple And The Dolls'. Dinah and the Paper Dolls are setting up a mini gymkhana for Dapple, who nibbles at the Doll's dresses.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Kite Season'. One windy day, Olivia invites all her friends to a kite-flying extravaganza. But by the time they've built their kites, they have a big problem: all the wind has stopped!

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Olivia Makes It Rain'. Olivia, Ian and Francine are excited for the toy boat race, but when they arrive at the park, they discover that the pond is all dried up.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - Why Mole Lives Underground'. Every sound made Mole's ears hurt, so one night when Elephants snoring Jackals howling and Owls twit twooing got too much Mole decided to DIG. She dug until she founds total silence.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - Why Squirrel Gathers Nuts'. One day there was very little food in Tinga Tinga, when squirrel finally realises that there isn't enough food to go around, she races around gathering nuts for all the animals.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E49 - The Case Of Bumpy's Burst Ball'. It's a play date afternoon in Toy Green and everyone is there having fun. Noddy has got a new ball for Bumpy to replace his old one that went missing.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E50 - The Case Of The Missing Wings'. The fairies are giving a big fairy flying display in Toyland. Fairy Coco is devastated when her wings disappear just before the Flying Display.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bob's Bad Breath/Trading Places'. Larry's bad habits make it hard for Bob to do his new job./Bob and Jimmy want new roommates so they decide to swap and get surprising results.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Big Flap'. Liam drives his cousin, then his other two podmates nuts when he refuses to let any of them know what's in the mysterious box he's been carrying around.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Finding Neko'. Birch's cat Neko disappears on Liam's watch. Realising that finding the AWOL feline is too big a job for just one guy, Liam has to convince a reluctant Sandra and Raffi.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Raffi Raffle'. The girls 'steal' Liam's fundraising to raffle off Raffi. Unfortunately, Principal Lemmon, who hates anything remotely fun is on Birch and Sandra's trail.

programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - The Cloud/Booverty'. Tip goes overboard while using Oh's storage cloud to declutter her room, Tip helps Oh prepare for his life-changing, dance-heavy Booverty ceremony.

programme.title: Cleopatra In Space
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - My Pharoah Lady'. Cleo poses as Pharaoh Yosira to convince other galactic leaders to join the fight against Octavian, while also uncovering which one of them is planning to kill Yosira.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Crimson And Clover'. Clover's wild, party-girl twin sister Crimson visits and King Julien is instantly smitten.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Research And Development'. With Baby Corp's stinkless serum falling in the hands of the enemy, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby challenges the team to create a new formula.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'Dreamworks The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants. S1/E13 - Captain Underpants and the Troublesome Treachery of the Thieving Toot Fairy'. It's a race against time as George and Harold try to get Mr Krupp fired.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Star'. Dulcinea secretly discovers a wishing star but, while trying to make things better through wishes, actually makes things a lot worse.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Maces And Talons Part 1'. When they learn the Dragon Hunters are tracking the Flightmare, Hiccup and Astrid race to stop them after Heather spills secrets from Viggo Grimborn.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Little Kisses/Snow Day'. Tip busts Oh eating kitty litter and says he'll never get kissed by My Mom again. Oh and Tip help out all his friends when they freeze into Boovsicles.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Volcano'. Ty and Revvit bravely stay behind to build and save their crater from a nearby volcano eruption, but D-Structsdoesn't want them to succeed.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Volcano'. Ty and Revvit bravely stay behind to build and save their crater from a nearby volcano eruption, but D-Structsdoesn't want them to succeed.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Perfect Show Again, The/Aristophanes'. Peabody and Sherman are surprised when all 25 time travel guests from each episode step out of the WABAC machine during the big season finale.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Total Nightmare'. When Hookfang is drawn to a female Monstrous Nightmare, Snotlout tries to break them up before he loses his friend forever.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - FrankenGeorge/ Afraid Of Nothing'. George accidentally unleashes a horde of zombie critters and catches a campfire fright.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Merry Scary Christmas'. It's Christmas and Casper wants to spend the holiday with his human pal, Jimmy.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - Noddy And The Lost Teeth'. Noddy is baffled by a rattling sound coming from Car until he finds a set of teeth inside the glove compartment. Noddy sets off to find the rest of the teeth to reunite them.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Frozen Fun'. Noddy is called to the Jelly Bowl where Mr Wobbly Man's malfunctioning hot fridge has not been helped by Lindy's magic. It's pouring out snow, perfect for the Little Skittles to have some fun in.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - Olivia's Old West Treasure Hunt'. A field trip to an old mining town goes awry when Mrs. Hogenmuller accidentally loses the key to the bus. Olivia leads her classmates as they retrace their steps.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 - Olivia's Dog Wash'. The Children's Reading room at the library is in need of new books and Olivia has the perfect plan to raise some money. With some help from her friends, she opens her own backyard dog washing service.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Why Cheetah Has Tears'. Every year Cheetah and Wind would race to see who's the fastest in Tinga Tinga and every year Cheetah would win, until one day.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E51 - The Case Of The Unfunny Clown'. Noddy and his friends are having a clown day and everyone is going to play at being clowns.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E52 - Noddy And The Case Of The Raining Carrots'. Farmer Tom is having a Farm Fair at the Animal Acres Farm but it looks set to be ruined by an unexpected shower of carrots, cabbages and then pumpkins.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Jimmy & Jerry Are Rich / Feelin' Hot, Hot, Hot'. Bob and Larry hatch a scheme to buy a monster truck. Pa Grape warns a freezing cold Petunia not to turn up the heat in his store.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Bossman's Blues'. Although it looks like a class treasure hunt, it's really all about cooperation. To push this point, Mr Towes appoints Liam to lead the group.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Birch's Beef'. Raffi's admission of vegetarianism has Birch immediately jumping on the flesh-free diet bandwagon. Eventually, she gives in to temptation sinking her teeth into a burger.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - A Fine Balance'. A falling out between Raffi and Liam puts Birch in an awkward position. Fed up with the impact the boys fight is having on her life, she recruits Sandra to help her.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Michelle refuses to share cupcakes with her brother as the crew heads up a mission to a planet of Garden Gnomes and Plastic Flamingos who are feuding over water rights.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Mad-Dog McSneer/Our Boy Wolfie'. The students have to do a presentation on the Underworld. A misunderstanding leads Jimmy's parents to believe that their son has turned into a werewolf.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Big in Japan'. Odlulu uses the Bubble Key to raise a sunken ship in the Bahamas, so the Wanderers and Wizard Doubloon chase her on the high seas before she steals the ship's booty.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Pigs'. Toby's dim bulb of a brother, Brandt, returns to San Lorenzo and begs Puss to help him reunite with his band of ninja brothers.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Pineapple Of My Eye'. Masikura tricks King Julien into believing that a pineapple contains all the souls and wisdom of the previous Julien Kings.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'Dreamworks The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants. S1/E1 - Captain Underpants and the Frenzied Farts of Flabby Fabulous'. George and Harold get revenge on their gym teacher by writing him into a ridiculous comic.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Wrinkles And Stinkles'. After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying fun house at the town fair.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - The Imposter/The Frenemy'. Branch and Poppy go on a man-hunt to track down the imposter in Troll Village. Poppy discovers that Archer Pastry belongs to an evil group, called the Party Crashers.

programme.title: Turbo Fast
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Zoo Lander/Balloonatics'. Shadow and Skidmark embark on a perilous adventure through the zoo to rescue Deuce, Whiplash attempts to prevent the crew from meeting his parents.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Grumblegard Part 1'. While the others care for baby dragons at the roost, Dak, Winger, Burple and Aggro come face-to-face with a grumpy old dragon on a dangerous island.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Postman Pat And The Cornish Caper'. Ted gives away his inventions to make space for a new engine, but now he's sad. Maybe Pat's special delivery will cheer him up?

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Raa Raa's Noisy Challenge'. Topsy is trying to read, but Raa Raa and the other jungle animals are all racing around making too much noise. Topsy is so upset she accidentally rips the last page from her book.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E42 - Catch The Page'. Topsy is trying to read, but Raa Raa and the other jungle animals are all racing around making too much noise.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 of 52 - Art In The Park'. Charley heads off to the park to draw a picture, but Rivet the park warden tells him that drawing is not allowed in the park, so Charley must think of another way to create the drawing he wants.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 of 52 - Charley Bear Sock Detective'. Charley becomes a detective to find his missing sock, but when the rest of his clothes go missing too, he realises there must be a clothes thief on the loose.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 of 52 - Charley Snaps'. Charley heads off to the beach to take some photos, but Frozo sticks his head in every shot, ruining them all. Then Charley realises that a photo with Frozo is just what he wants.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Nest'. When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they're invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - Catch That Page'. Topsy is trying to read, but Raa Raa and the other animals are making too much noise.

programme.desc: 'S22/E47'. We help a young viewer choose a fast and exciting set of wheels. Hatchback arch rivals from Mazda and Toyota go head to head and we consider the long-term reliability of the Renault Clio GT-Line.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: 'S6/E2'. Tim and Fuzz take on Gary's Lancia Delta Integrale Evo II, sadly before the car is returned tragedy strikes when Gary unexpectedly passes away.

programme.title: Matat2Pont
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. The ride begins in Matatiele through the mountainous region of the EC and KZN to Kokstad, heads towards Harding on day 2, and finally crosses the Umtamvuna river over our infamous floating bridge at The Pont in Port Edward.

programme.title: GT Supercup
programme.desc: 'S22/E3'. Record entries lined up on the grid for the final round of the GT Supercars season at the Phakisa Freeway seeing seasoned campaigners and novices going door to door in three sprint racers and one endurance race.

programme.title: All Things Motoring
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. This week on ALL THINGS MOTORING, we chat with some new friends about their passion projects and we then head out to see some sights and sounds in Mpumalanga to see what the Lowveld has to offer.

programme.title: The Bike Show
programme.desc: 'S22/E47'. New models and technology from the world's biggest motorcycle expo in Milan on this week's Bike Show, and we catch up with Hero's latest moves in SA.

programme.title: Car Crash Global: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 of 8'. Featuring astonishing accidents, spectacular smashes, and enthralling escapes, Car Crash Global: Caught on Camera presents some of the most incredible videos from the world's roads.

programme.title: Ovalandr: Highlights
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Blood, sweat, and tears... The mission has been accomplished. Navigating the great escapement from Limpopo to KwaZulu-Natal, our fearless ladies have put it all on the line to become the ultimate overlanders.

programme.title: Porsche Carrera Cup
programme.desc: 'S22/E6'. This week we are back with you again for rounds Five and Six of the Porsche Carrera Cup Asia 2022 taking place at Zhuzhou International Circuit, China.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue 401
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Men and women face incredible stakes in a fast-paced, relentless environment. Jobs and lives depend on these highways. And it's up to Heavy Rescue to keep them open.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Holidays Thru Hell'. Al and Gord battle through a stormy night to keep the Coquihalla Highway open for Christmas.

programme.title: RestoMod
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. RestoMod show travels South Africa talking to classic and custom car builders, part suppliers, and manufacturing companies. From Hot Rods to custom Bikes from Boats to 4x4, RestoMod has something for every petrolhead!

programme.title: SUV Superbuild
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. The Chevrolet Suburban SUV is one of the longest-running nameplates in the automotive world.

programme.title: 4WD to the Max

programme.title: A Perfect Match

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: Hugh Grant and Sarah Jessica Parker star in this romcom. A couple with a disastrous marriage witness a murder and are forced to enter the witness relocation programme.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Seth MacFarlane team up again for an insane furry sequel. Ted and his new wife want a family, but first he must prove that he's a person in a court of law.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Photo Op, Remy Rescue'. Bill tries to trick the family into having a photo taken. Can Cricket stop Remy's parents sending him away to school?

programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - Little Frogtown/Hopping Mall'. Anne and the Plantars travel to the city of Newtopia.

programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Quarreler's Pass / Toadcatcher'. Sprig, Polly, Sasha and Grime try to get along.

programme.title: Hannah Montana

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E87 - Retreat Yourself'. Raven has a vision about her dad's health and takes him to a relaxation retreat. Meanwhile, Booker learns that it's Alice's birthday and throws an impromptu party for her.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E104 - 4/104'. Shadow Moth's trap closes in on Ladybug and Cat Noir, threatening to turn their fate upside down forever...

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E79 - Truth'. A friend of Marinette's gets akumatized into Truth. Using his power to force people to tell the truth, he wants to know Marinette's secret...and Ladybug and Cat Noir's, too!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Avalanche'. Chase heads for the Arctic to get some rare minerals Davenport needs and is trapped in an avalanche. He's rescued by Douglas Davenport, then the true aim of his mission emerges.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Big Deal/Forbidden Feline'. Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Coffee Quest, Phoenix Rises'. There's a coffee shortage. Can Cricket get some? The Greens' dog Phoenix runs away. Can the family find her?

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Goat Your Own Way / the Very Hungry Ghost'. Molly insists on training an unruly goat the 'Molly way'. When the McGees celebrate a Thai holiday about feeding 'hungry ghosts', Scratch tries to keep the feast all to himself.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Sleepwalk This Way'. Miley starts sleepwalking and telling the truth to everyone, which gets her into trouble with the school's strictest teacher.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Straight Outta Time'. Griffin and Harper learn the camp dance is coming up, and that is the day Savannah went missing! Later, Harper meets Jess, and learns her mother did go to camp and hated Savannah!

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Chore Wars'. Adam, Bree and Chase learn about money by doing chores for cash, and getting an allowance. They get obsessed with making as much money as possible, and sell items from the house.

programme.desc: Paul Hackett is a hapless guy whose night becomes increasingly surreal as he tries and fails to get home from work, and is pursued through NYC by a cast of bizarre characters.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: LAPD Detectives Martin Riggs, Roger Murtaugh, and Lorna Cole return to battle a the head of a Chinese Triad crime ring specialising in counterfeiting and modern-day slavery.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends get together for one last weekend-long bachelor party in Vegas, they think they had a good time.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Won over by Maggie Fitzgerald's sheer determination, Boxing trainer Frankie Dunn agrees to take her on, recognising they share a common spirit.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: The fastest hands in the East meet the biggest mouth in the West when legendary martial arts daredevil Jackie Chan teams with comedic powerhouse Chris Tucker in Rush Hour.

programme.title: Spies Like Us
programme.desc: Two naive government employees are used as a bait to distract russian agents.

programme.title: Action Directors - Roland Emmerich
programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin of Locksley comes back home to England to find his father dead in the ruins of his family estate, killed by the vicious sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Private Benjamin
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn stars in this classic 80's comedy as Judy Benjamin, a spoilt young woman who mistakenly joins the US army on a whim after her husband dies on their wedding night.

programme.title: San Andreas
programme.desc: A rescue pilot and his estranged wife embark on a treacherous journey to save their daughter after a catastrophic earthquake.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: 6 Bullets
programme.desc: An ex-mercenary known for finding missing children is hired by a mixed martial arts fighter whose daughter has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Horror Behind The Walls'. A 19th-century prison hides a chilling secret within its walls. A sealed door haunts a British museum and residents from the past roam a historic village.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Statler City Hotel'. In their biggest investigation yet, Nick and Katrina spend 72 hours exploring the Statler City Hotel in Buffalo, NY - and uncover its sordid underground history.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Mystery Of The Invisible Planet'. A probe mysteriously malfunctions as it enters deep space. Astronomers find evidence of an invisible planet in a distant solar system.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extra-terrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Return Of The Yeti'. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - All The Kings' Horses'. Don Wildman examines a plaque that salutes a young boy and his pig who sparked a cultural craze. Plus, he visits a gravesite that witnessed freedom.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - The Real Q'. Host Don Wildman visits Britain's MI6 where spymasters groomed a gadget genius. He also visits a quirky monument honouring a mythical turtle.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Discord, Deer And Discovery'. After having been hit by a huge storm, the miners must band together to fix the damage to their camp. But with spirits low can they resolve the issue?

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extra-terrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Return Of The Yeti'. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Deadly Cults'. Whether its religious fire-and-brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Escape From Area 51'. After an informant tells of an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, Chuck and the team go to Tonopah, NV, to investigate whether it still roams the area.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E4 - Roswell Revealed'. Josh's search for alien life ends in the USA, with a hot case in Arkansas. And, there's shocking new evidence in the Roswell crash.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Harlem Hellfighters'. Don Wildman heads to Harlem to view a memorial dedicated to little-known WWI heroes. Plus, he goes to the Pantheon in Paris to pay respect to an iconic inventor.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Savior Of The Squalus And More'. Don Wildman examines an American memorial. Plus, he visits an iconic structure in Italy and a German park marking a sweet tale of a war hero.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Redemption Ridge'. With only 10 days left in Greenland, the team has one last chance. But with only four spots on the helicopter who gives them the best chances of striking it rich?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Gold'. Gold is one of the most valuable treasures on Earth. Since ancient times, man has gone to extreme lengths to get it. But where is most of the gold today, and who owns it?

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alien Harvesting'. Blood sucking aliens bring the team to Indiana. After some disturbing reports, the team are hot on the trail of a case of aliens allegedly stealing human blood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Mars' Deepest Secret'. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with a deadly gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Falls River, MA'. In Massachusetts, the team investigates the home of the alleged murderer, Lizzie Borden. Was she responsible for the crimes, or under the control of a dark force?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Dead Men Tell Tales'. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey investigate a jail in Florida. Rumours suggest murderous spirits are lurking in this property.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Shrewsbury Prison'. Nick and Katrina unlock the dark secrets of HMS Shrewsbury Prison in England, exploring 200 years of executions, anger and tragedy - and discovering new threats.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E10 - The Blurry Man'. Amy and Steve head to Illinois, where a panic-stricken family claims life in their new home has been hellish. The parents fear their kids could get seriously hurt.
